channel.title: nlin.SI updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: nlin.SI updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Spin Ruijsenaars-Schneider models are Coulomb branches
item.description: arXiv:2603.03048v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this paper, we show that the Poisson algebras of cohomological and $K$-theoretic Coulomb branches of 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ necklace quiver gauge theories provide Poisson structures and Hamiltonians that reproduce the equations of motion of the rational and hyperbolic spin Ruijsenaars-Schneider models, respectively. The construction is carried out in terms of monopole operators in the GKLO representation, also making the affine Yangian (and, in $K$-theory, quantum toroidal) superintegrability structure manifest. We conjecture that the Poisson algebras of elliptic Coulomb branches similarly reproduce the elliptic spin Ruijsenaars-Schneider model.
item.dc:creator: Gleb Arutyunov, Lukas Hardi

item.title: Long time asymptotics for the KPII equation
item.description: arXiv:2509.02907v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The long-time asymptotics of small Kadomtsev-Petviashvili II (KPII) solutions is derived using the inverse scattering theory and the stationary phase method.
item.dc:creator: Derchyi Wu
